final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multiple UI panels arranged in a layered, hierarchical layout — Dashboard (web), mobile screens, cards, buttons, and controls all visible
Subject: must include:
  - Web Dashboard panel
  - Mobile interface screens
  - UI cards
  - Buttons (various states)
  - Controls / widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep dark tech-environment backdrop — exact treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-tech atmosphere with strong depth and visual hierarchy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction with high contrast and luminous accent highlights — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glassy or frosted-surface treatment with layered depth — exact sheen and grain are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all five UI component categories (Dashboard / mobile / cards / buttons / controls) as clearly distinguishable elements
Avoid: flat, dull, low-contrast, or overly generic UI mockup aesthetics
